title: euphorbia leucantha
intro: Euphorbia leucantha, also known as Naked Lady or Euphorbia, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is native to South Africa and is known for its striking white bracts and greenish-yellow flowers, which appear in late summer and early fall. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Euphorbia leucantha include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves.
